message.content:
Find everything related to `.newsfeed-header` in the codebase. I need:
1. The CSS rules for `.newsfeed-header` in `client/src/components/HomePage/home.css` and any other CSS files — include all media query variants
2. Where `.newsfeed-header` is used in JSX (it may be commented out in Home.jsx, but check PostCards.jsx and any other files)
3. How the feed tabs/header (For You, Following, etc.) are currently rendered — search for "feed-tab", "tab-bar", "newsfeed", "filter" class names in PostCards.jsx and postcards.css
4. The scroll behavior and positioning context — check `.center-bar-holder-container` overflow and position properties in home.css

Be thorough — check all media queries and responsive breakpoints.

content.text: I'll search for all of these systematically in parallel.
